name: New England Scones
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Cold butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Mix flour, baking powder, soda, orange peel, and salt in a large bowl.
3. Cut in the cold butter with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. In a separate bowl, toss currants with sugar.
5. Add the currant mixture to the dry ingredients and mix well.
6. In a small bowl, whisk egg yolk and buttermilk. Pour into the flour mixture and stir just to combine.
7. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Knead gently with your hands until it comes together.
8. Roll the dough into an 11-inch circle. Cut into wedges.
9. Place scones on a lightly greased baking sheet.
10. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned and no longer raw in the center. Do not overbake.
11. Allow to cool before serving. Drizzle with powdered sugar icing if desired.
